TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Atayal Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://tay.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: qalang Syanoh qa nyux maki squ Qirang leng nya qa cyux maki qutux llyung lzing ki llaw ru suruw nya ga rgyax kwara betunux balay ktan pzyux balay bqanux maki squ rgyax pzyux balay qulih nya llyung uzi pzyux balay ramat nya yal nqu tqenuw , sehuy.... qmayah uzi cyux maki qutux pqwasan laqi cikuy , baqun musa mqwas biru llaqi qalang myan soyan myan balay qalang myan Syanoh
S.PHON: qalaŋ s~ɕjanoħ qa njux maki s~ɕqu qiraŋ leŋ nja qa ʦ~ʨjux maki qutux lljuŋ lziŋ ki llaw ru s~ɕuruw nja ɣa rɣjax kwara βetunux βalaj ktan pzjux βalaj βqanux maki s~ɕqu rɣjax pzjux βalaj quliħ nja lljuŋ uzi pzjux βalaj ramat nja jal nqu tqenuw , s~ɕeħuj.... qmajaħ uzi ʦ~ʨjux maki qutux pqwas~ɕan laqi ʦ~ʨikuj , βaqun mus~ɕa mqwas~ɕ βiru llaqi qalaŋ mjan s~ɕojan mjan βalaj qalaŋ mjan s~ɕjanoħ
S.FORM: qalang Syanoh qa nyux maki squ Qirang leng nya qa cyux maki qutux llyung lzing ki llaw ru suruw nya ga rgyax kwara betunux balay ktan pzyux balay bqanux maki squ rgyax pzyux balay qulih nya llyung uzi pzyux balay ramat nya yal nqu tqenuw , sehuy.... qmayah uzi cyux maki qutux pqwasan laqi cikuy , baqun musa mqwas biru llaqi qalang myan soyan myan balay qalang myan Syanoh
S.PHON: qalaŋ s~ɕjanoħ qa njux maki s~ɕqu qiraŋ leŋ nja qa ʦ~ʨjux maki qutux lljuŋ lziŋ ki llaw ru s~ɕuruw nja ɣa rɣjax kwara βetunux βalaj ktan pzjux βalaj βqanux maki s~ɕqu rɣjax pzjux βalaj quliħ nja lljuŋ uzi pzjux βalaj ramat nja jal nqu tqenuw , s~ɕeħuj.... qmajaħ uzi ʦ~ʨjux maki qutux pqwas~ɕan laqi ʦ~ʨikuj , βaqun mus~ɕa mqwas~ɕ βiru llaqi qalaŋ mjan s~ɕojan mjan βalaj qalaŋ mjan s~ɕjanoħ
